title: Geo-bounded chat (chat with nearby strangers)
business_context: Location-based: chat with users within 1km. Scale: 100k DAU.

database_design.schema: const GeoMsgSchema=new Schema({_id:String,senderId:String,senderLoc:{type:Object},body:String,at:Date});\nconst UserLocSchema=new Schema({userId:String,geo:{type:Object},updatedAt:Date});\nUserLocSchema.index({geo:'2dsphere'});

race_conditions_addressed: Cell transition: leave old + join new atomically per socket.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: broadcast all. Privacy + cost.

title: Internal feature flag dashboard with live rollout %
business_context: DevOps watches flag rollout % vs error rate. Scale: 1k flags.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE flags(id BIGSERIAL PK,name TEXT,env TEXT,rollout_pct NUMERIC,error_rate NUMERIC,status TEXT,updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ);\nCREATE TABLE flag_metrics(id BIGSERIAL PK,flag_id BIGINT,error_count BIGINT,total BIGINT,window_start TIMESTAMPTZ);

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client toggles flag. No server enforcement.

title: Online chess with clock + premove
business_context: Chess: per-player clock, premoves queued for fast play. Scale: 5k games.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE chess_games(id BIGSERIAL PK,white BIGINT,black BIGINT,fen TEXT,turn CHAR(1),white_clock_ms INT,black_clock_ms INT,clock_started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,status TEXT);\nCREATE TABLE chess_moves(id BIGSERIAL PK,game_id BIGINT,uci TEXT,played_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

race_conditions_addressed: Clock timeout race: server-time check inside tx.
Premove: stored client-side, sent on opponent state event.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client clock. Cheaters spoof time.

title: Concert ticket drop with anti-bot queue
business_context: Tickets release: waiting room → release; anti-bot CAPTCHA. Scale: 100k waiters.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE shows(id BIGSERIAL PK,name TEXT,inventory INT);\nCREATE TABLE waiters(id BIGSERIAL PK,show_id BIGINT,user_id BIGINT,joined_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),admitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ);\nCREATE TABLE holds(id BIGSERIAL PK,show_id BIGINT,user_id BIGINT,expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,purchased BOOLEAN DEFAULT false);

socket_io_design.middleware_order: auth → server-side CAPTCHA verification → per-user/show idempotency → rate-limit → audit.

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: FIFO. Bots first in queue win.

title: VR avatar position sync in shared room
business_context: VR room: avatars sync head + hand pose at 30Hz. Scale: 1k rooms × 30 users.

database_design.schema: const VrRoomSchema=new Schema({_id:String,users:[String]});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: emit pose on every change. Bus dies.

title: 3D model annotations (CAD review)
business_context: CAD review: pins on 3D model coords. Scale: 5k models.

database_design.schema: const CadPinSchema=new Schema({_id:String,modelId:String,modelVersion:Number,pos:[Number],normal:[Number],note:String,authorId:String});

race_conditions_addressed: Model version: pins scoped per version.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: screen-space coords. Camera rotate breaks.

title: Critical alert paging with multi-channel + escalation chain
business_context: PagerDuty-clone. Scale: 10k orgs.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for alerts + ack. BullMQ for channel dispatch.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE pages(id BIGSERIAL PK,service_id BIGINT,acked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,acked_via TEXT,escalation_step INT DEFAULT 0);\nCREATE TABLE page_dispatches(id BIGSERIAL PK,page_id BIGINT,channel TEXT,sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ);

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: SMS only. Provider down = miss.

title: Fish-farm water-quality monitor
business_context: Aquaculture: O2/pH/temp per tank. Scale: 10k tanks.

database_design.schema: const FishSampleSchema=new Schema({tankId:String,ts:Date,o2:Number,ph:Number,tempC:Number},{timeseries:{timeField:'ts',metaField:'tankId'}});

race_conditions_addressed: Action loop: throttle action commands per tank.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: no inline check. Fish die before alert sweep.

title: Group fitness class with instructor screen + chat
business_context: Live fitness: instructor screen-share + chat. Scale: 1k classes × 500 attendees.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for class + attendance. SFU + Socket.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE fitness_classes(id BIGSERIAL PK,instructor_id BIGINT,starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ,recording_url TEXT);

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: no rate-limit. Bus melt.

title: Customer complaint workflow with multi-team handoff
business_context: Complaints flow: support → escalations → legal; each adds notes. Scale: 50k orgs.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE complaints(id BIGSERIAL PK,customer_id BIGINT,current_team TEXT,status TEXT,opened_at TIMESTAMPTZ);\nCREATE TABLE complaint_stages(complaint_id BIGINT,team TEXT,entered_at TIMESTAMPTZ,exited_at TIMESTAMPTZ);\nCREATE TABLE complaint_notes(id BIGSERIAL PK,complaint_id BIGINT,author_id BIGINT,team TEXT,body TEXT,public BOOLEAN,at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client picks team. Skip stages.

title: Slow-query analyzer with live recommendation
business_context: DB tuner: analyzes slow queries; recommends index. Scale: 100 DBs.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE recommendations(id BIGSERIAL PK,db_id BIGINT,query_hash TEXT,recommended_ddl TEXT,impact_estimate JSONB,applied BOOLEAN,applied_at TIMESTAMPTZ);

race_conditions_addressed: Apply during load: server should rate-limit DDL.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: auto-apply. Bad index hurts.

title: Marketing copy A/B variant editor
business_context: Multiple writers iterate on ad copy A/B variants. Scale: 5k campaigns.

database_design.schema: const CopyVariantSchema=new Schema({_id:String,campaignId:String,letter:String,text:String,votes:Number,wonAt:Date,version:Number});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: last write wins, no vote dedup.

title: Customer-success NPS with conversational follow-up
business_context: NPS survey + chat for low scores. Scale: 1M users.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE nps_responses(id BIGSERIAL PK,user_id BIGINT,score INT,comment TEXT,submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());\nCREATE TABLE nps_chats(nps_id BIGINT,chat_id BIGINT,started_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),PRIMARY KEY(nps_id));

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: low score = email later. Lost retention chance.

title: Network device traffic with port-level live
business_context: NetOps: live port byte/packet rate per switch. Scale: 1k devices.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE iface_samples(device_id BIGINT,port TEXT,ts TIMESTAMPTZ,bytes_in BIGINT,bytes_out BIGINT,PRIMARY KEY(device_id,port,ts));\nSELECT create_hypertable('iface_samples','ts');

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: regular table. Disk explodes.

title: D&D virtual tabletop with grid + tokens
business_context: DnD VTT: grid map, tokens for characters; DM controls. Scale: 5k sessions.

database_design.schema: const VttSchema=new Schema({_id:String,dmId:String,mapKey:String,tokens:[{id:String,name:String,x:Number,y:Number,owner:String}],initiative:[{tokenId:String,roll:Number}]});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client rolls dice. Cheaters always crit.

title: Charity auction with proxy bidding
business_context: Bidder sets max; system auto-bids up to that. Scale: 500 events.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE charity_lots(id BIGSERIAL PK,current_bid_cents BIGINT DEFAULT 0,current_bidder BIGINT,status TEXT);\nCREATE TABLE proxies(lot_id BIGINT,bidder_id BIGINT,max_cents BIGINT,PRIMARY KEY(lot_id,bidder_id));
database_design.queries: On any bid, recompute against all proxies.

race_conditions_addressed: Two same max: order by max desc + bidder_id ASC.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client proxy. Max leaked.

title: Hospital staff location tracker (RTLS)
business_context: Real-time location via BLE beacons; staff visible to coordinator. Scale: 10k staff.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE rtls_samples(staff_id BIGINT,beacon_id TEXT,zone_id BIGINT,ts TIMESTAMPTZ,PRIMARY KEY(staff_id,ts));\nSELECT create_hypertable('rtls_samples','ts');\nCREATE TABLE staff_shifts(staff_id BIGINT,starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ,ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ,PRIMARY KEY(staff_id,starts_at));

socket_io_design.middleware_order: auth → coordinator role → zone/facility scope check on every subscription.

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: broadcast all. Privacy violation.

title: Patent claim review with cited prior art
business_context: Patent examiners annotate claims with prior art references. Scale: 100k patents.
architecture_reasoning: 1. Mongo for annotations. PG for patents + approvals.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE patents(id BIGSERIAL PK,title TEXT,status TEXT);\nconst PatentAnnoSchema=new Schema({_id:String,patentId:String,claimIdx:Number,examinerId:String,decision:String,priorArt:[{patentId:String,relevance:String}],note:String,createdAt:Date});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: embed annotations in patent doc. Concurrent writes lose.

title: Cross-platform calendar reminder dispatch
business_context: Calendar reminders → push/SMS/email per user pref. Scale: 1M reminders/day.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for reminders. BullMQ for delayed jobs.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE reminders(id BIGSERIAL PK,user_id BIGINT,event_id BIGINT,fire_at TIMESTAMPTZ,snoozed_until TIMESTAMPTZ,fired_at TIMESTAMPTZ);

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: cron polling. Drift.

title: Beacon-based attendance for events
business_context: Concert: BLE beacons check attendees in. Scale: 100k attendees per event.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE event_checkins(event_id BIGINT,attendee_id BIGINT,section_id BIGINT,checked_in_at TIMESTAMPTZ,PRIMARY KEY(event_id,attendee_id));

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: counter in memory. Restart loses.

title: Real-time language interpretation booth (relay)
business_context: Conference: interpreters relay translation; attendees pick language. Scale: 100 events × 10 languages.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for events. SFU per language stream.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE interpret_events(id BIGSERIAL PK,name TEXT);\nCREATE TABLE interpret_streams(event_id BIGINT,lang TEXT,interpreter_id BIGINT,sfu_node TEXT,PRIMARY KEY(event_id,lang));

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: one stream all. No language.

title: Travel itinerary co-planning
business_context: Group trip planner: multiple users add destinations/votes. Scale: 50k trips.

database_design.schema: const TripSchema=new Schema({_id:String,members:[String],days:[{date:Date,items:[{_id:String,title:String,votes:[String],costCents:Number,order:Number}]}],finalized:Boolean});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: array mutation. Concurrent writes lose.

title: Workflow engine with conditional branches
business_context: BPM workflow: visual designer; tasks assigned to roles; branches by data. Scale: 50k orgs.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE wf_instances(id BIGSERIAL PK,wf_def_id BIGINT,state JSONB,status TEXT,current_step TEXT);\nCREATE TABLE wf_tasks(id BIGSERIAL PK,instance_id BIGINT,step TEXT,assignee_id BIGINT,status TEXT,completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ);

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client decides next step. Trust broken.

title: Test case management with live execution updates
business_context: QA: test cases run; status streams. Scale: 100k tests.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for cases + executions. Mongo for capture logs.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE test_cases(id BIGSERIAL PK,suite TEXT,name TEXT);\nCREATE TABLE executions(id BIGSERIAL PK,case_id BIGINT,run_id BIGINT,status TEXT,duration_ms INT,at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());\nconst CaptureSchema=new Schema({executionId:String,stack:String,logs:String});

what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: in-memory map. Crash loses.

title: Capstone: AI moderation + chat with auto-action
business_context: Chat with realtime ML moderation: bad content auto-deleted; user warned. Scale: 1M DAU.
architecture_reasoning: 1. PG for messages + moderation actions. Mongo for ML metadata.

database_design.schema: CREATE TABLE mod_messages(id BIGSERIAL PK,channel_id BIGINT,sender_id BIGINT,body TEXT,deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,deletion_reason TEXT,severity NUMERIC);\nCREATE TABLE mod_appeals(id BIGSERIAL PK,message_id BIGINT,user_id BIGINT,reason TEXT,status TEXT,at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

race_conditions_addressed: Bypass: moderation runs server-side and fail-closed/queues when unavailable.
Membership: msg:send re-checks channel membership before persistence and broadcast.
scaling_considerations: 1M DAU: cache severity by hash; throttle model calls.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Junior: client-side filter. Bypass trivial.
